case_title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP VS. ELIZABETH SHORT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT ALSO INCLUDES THE ADDRESS 473 ELLIS STREET, #708, SF,CA 94102 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SHORT, ELIZABETH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
